Module 1 · NotebookLM Advanced
What Is NotebookLM?
Click each card to compare — flip to see the difference
🧠
NotebookLM
Click to reveal
Your AI, trained on YOUR files
Only uses what you upload. Perfect for personalised teaching materials.
💬
ChatGPT
Click to reveal
General AI, trained on the internet
Broad knowledge. Great for generating new content. May hallucinate on specific local context.
Today with NLM:   ① Extract content  ·  ② Set personas  ·  ③ Generate IP slides
Module 1 · NotebookLM Advanced
What Is Data Extraction?
The idea is simple:
📂 ➜ 💬 ➜ ✨
Drop your messy teaching materials in, then ask NLM to pull out exactly what you need — in any format.
📋
Lists
📊
Tables
🖼️
Infographics
Why is this powerful?
Instead of spending hours reformatting notes, you just ask. NLM reads your file and gives you a structured output instantly.
Module 1 · Try It #1
Generate an Infographic
Demo first:
1
Upload your material
Drag any teaching document into NLM
2
Ask in the chat
"Generate an infographic summarising this"
3
Get structured output
Download or screenshot the result
🎯 Your Turn — Post to Padlet
Create your own infographic
① Upload one of your teaching materials
② Extract → generate an infographic
③ post to Padlet 📸
⏱10 minutes
Module 1 · Try It #2
Custom Persona Setup
1
Open System Prompt
Click ⚙️ in NLM → Customise
2
Define your AI assistant
e.g. "You are a Chinese question generator for Primary 6"
3
Generate a question sheet
Ask it to create comprehension or grammar questions
Example roles: Chinese question generator · homeroom letter writer · lesson planner · parent reply assistant
🎯 Your Turn — Post to Padlet
Build your own AI assistant
① Set a persona relevant to your subject
② Generate a question sheet or worksheet
③ post to Padlet 📸
⏱10 minutes
AI Style Prompt Generator ↗Minit Curai Persona ↗
Module 1 · NotebookLM Advanced
Your Personal
IP Character
Turn your teaching style and image into an AI-callable character that appears on every slide of your presentation.
Module 1 · Demo
Generate Your IP Character
1
Upload your photo
A clear, front-facing photo works best
2
Add a style prompt
e.g. "Transform into a friendly cartoon educator in warm colours"
3
Download your IP image
PNG format recommended for transparency
4
Save it — you'll use it next
This becomes your signature teaching avatar
Why it matters
Every slide of your AI-generated presentation features your character — making it instantly recognisable as yours. Students connect with it too.
IP Character Generator ↗
Module 1 · NotebookLM Advanced
Slide Structure Generator
1
Extract content → generate outline
In the NLM chat: "Generate a 10-slide outline for this topic"
2
Download as .txt
Copy the outline → save as a .txt file on your device
3
Re-upload to NLM as a new source
Now NLM has your structure as a separate reference
4
Select .txt + IP image → Generate Slides
Tick both sources → click Generate Presentation
Slide Generator ↗
Module 1 · Try It #3
Generate Your Presentation
1
Generate outline in chat
2
Save as .txt → re-upload
3
Select .txt + your IP image
4
Generate Slides → done
🎯 Your Turn — Post to Padlet
Make your IP presentation
① Combine your IP image + outline
② Generate your personalised slides
③ post to Padlet 📸
⏱12 minutes

Module 2
Animation
with AI
MODULE 2
AI Animation
5-step workflow: Storyboard → Narration → Voiceover → Google Vids → YouTube
Module 2 · Animation
Step 1: Storyboard Slides
1
Generate outline in NLM chat
Start in the chat area first, not Slides
2
Save outline as a source (.txt)
This becomes the storyboard blueprint
3
Generate Slides with this prompt
"Strictly follow each slide's illustration suggestion, generate 5 slides"
Why 5 slides?
Google Vids works best with 4–6 images. 5 slides = 5 illustrations = a natural video length of ~60 seconds.
AI Animation Video Studio ↗
Module 2 · Animation
Step 2: Narration Script
1
Copy your storyboard outline
The same outline you generated in Step 1
2
Go to trainer website
Open the "Voice & Subtitles" section
3
Paste outline → generate narration
AI writes a natural voiceover script for each slide
4
Download the MP3
Your narration audio is ready
What you get
A natural-sounding narration script matched to each slide, read in a clear teacher voice. No recording booth needed.
Module 2 · Optional Step
Google AI Studio Voiceover
1
Open AI Studio
aistudio.google.com (personal account only)
2
Paste narration text
Copy from Step 2 output
3
Click Run → Download MP3
Higher quality voice than the trainer website
This step is optional — the trainer website MP3 from Step 2 is sufficient for most purposes.
Module 2 · Animation
Step 3: Google Vids
1
Upload your 5 storyboard images
One image per slide from your NLM presentation
2
Click Animate Image on each
Generates 4-second animated clip per image
3
Add your MP3 narration
Drag the audio file onto the timeline
4
Fix subtitles → Simplified Chinese
Select All → Google Translate → paste back
Module 2 · Try It
Full Run-Through
Complete all 5 steps and produce your animation video
✓
Step 1 · Storyboard slides generated in NLM
✓
Step 2 · Narration script written & MP3 downloaded
✓
Step 3 · Images animated in Google Vids
✓
Step 4 · Audio added to timeline
✓
Step 5 · Subtitles corrected

Module 3
ChatGPT
Image 2.0
MODULE 3
ChatGPT Image 2.0
OpenAI's latest image model — smarter than DALL·E, reads text accurately, built for teaching.
Module 3 · ChatGPT Image 2.0
Where to Find Prompts?
Two official entry points — both give you ready-made prompts to learn from
①
openai.com/gpt-4o-image
Switch to Classic mode → browse examples → click any image to see its exact prompt. Best for inspiration.
②
ChatGPT → "Create image" → Style cards
20+ preset styles: infographic · handwritten notes · blueprint poster · comic strip… Click any card and the prompt auto-fills. Zero prompt writing needed.
Module 3 · Teaching Applications
3 Ways to Use It for Teaching
Tap each card to see how
📊
Infographic Poster
tap to flip
Step by step:
"Create image" → select Infographic template → paste your teaching content → generate
🎞️
Step Breakdown
tap to flip
Comic / Action sequences:
Describe each step + add "3:1 wide ratio" to your prompt. Great for PE, science procedures, cooking steps.
📑
Multi-page Slides
tap to flip
3 must-haves:
① State the page count · ② Set model to highest · ③ Enable "Create image" mode. Miss one → it won't work.
Module 3 · Try It #4
10-Minute Self-Study Challenge

Generate your teaching image
① Go to ChatGPT → "Create image"
② Browse the style cards
③ Choose a style that fits your classroom
④ Generate your image → post to Padlet 📸
Explore freely — there's no wrong answer here
